title: 比对工具:渐进式改造跑得通的隐形基础设施
content:

老系统改造,新老两边的输出如果不能用工具自动 diff,就只能 靠人盯。靠人盯一定会漏。

title: 8 年重构踩坑的领悟：渐进式改造
content: Over eight years, the author completed four successful system rewrites—order migration, Redis refactoring, SOA transformation, and master data consolidation—using gradual replacement rather than rebuilding. The approach involves slicing changes into weekly chunks, running old and new systems in parallel with comparison tools, and prioritizing rollback switches. Each project took 1–2 years with fine-grained gray releases. However, this fails when business requirements change rapidly, forcing dual maintenance and extended risk windows; direct cutover then works better. The core principle: prioritize reversibility over initial correctness.

title: Tyler Cowen & Alex Tabarrok on AI, Jobs, and Economic Growth
content: Economists Tyler Cowen and Alex Tabarrok discuss AI's impact on labor markets with OpenAI's Wyatt Thomson. They argue economic growth matters more than job displacement fears, noting productivity technologies historically transform work, create industries, and raise living standards despite disruptions. Topics include automation, comparative advantage, inequality, education, healthcare, energy, and valuable future work. They also address abundance, ownership, AI agents, and societal adaptation to rapid technological change.

title: Eagle Computer: The rise and fall of an early PC clone
content: Eagle Computer was an early IBM PC clone manufacturer that experienced rapid success followed by decline. The company emerged during the 1980s personal computer boom, capitalizing on the growing market for compatible systems. Despite initial growth, Eagle Computer ultimately failed to sustain its business, joining numerous other early PC companies that collapsed during that competitive era. Its trajectory illustrates the volatile nature of the early personal computer industry.

content: A person was summoned to a local police station after a stranger called requesting their presence. Officers informed them that a company website allegedly hosted pornographic content. The individual clarified that the domain had not been used since 2019, though it remained registered under their company's name. After submitting documentation proving no involvement, they received official notices and informational materials before departing. The key lesson: cancel domain registrations for unused domains to avoid similar complications.

title: 荔枝+龙眼=？全球首个新品种在广东诞生！ | 原文
content: Chinese researchers in Guangdong have developed the world's first successful hybrid between lychee and longan, two related but genetically incompatible fruit species. Using a technique that tricked lychee pistils into accepting longan pollen, the team created a hybrid tree from a late-maturing lychee mother and "Shixia" longan father in 2015. The tree recently produced its first fruits.

content: WeChat is developing an AI agent that will let users complete tasks via natural language by automatically calling mini-programs within the app. The platform released developer guidelines requiring apps to integrate or risk losing AI-driven discovery. Meituan, Trip.com, and other services have already joined. WeChat is also partnering with phone makers like Huawei and Xiaomi on A2A (Agent-to-Agent) protocols, rejecting screen-reading GUI approaches to maintain ecosystem control. The system handles intent understanding, multi-step task execution, and payment processing across WeChat's 1.4 billion monthly users.

title: 一个月 400 刀订阅，换来的关于 AI 编程的个人理解
content: The author shares insights from spending $400 monthly on AI coding tools. Key points: AI programming requires robust infrastructure for cheap, stable, end-to-end testing that scales. Don't expect correct code on first try; don't rely on completing all documentation before coding. Product teams should resist adding features just because AI enables them—simplicity prevents complexity. For unfamiliar domains, build quickly, learn from structural flaws, then rebuild using AI's convenience for iteration. Multiple rebuilds yield better architecture and maintainability. AI coding lets individuals convert time and money into deployable products with cleaner design.

title: 周靖人，阿里史上第一位首席科学家
content: Alibaba merged its Tongyi LLM division and Future Life Lab into a new Token Foundry division, directly led by CEO Wu Yongming. Zhou Jingren, Tongyi's head and Alibaba's first-ever Chief Scientist, will lead a new AI Future Research Institute focused on frontier AI exploration. VP Zheng Bo and his teams (Happy Horse video generation model and Happy Oyster world model) also joined Token Foundry. This restructuring, following March's ATH group formation, concentrates computing resources for model R&D and commercialization. Alibaba's AI revenue reached 8.97 billion yuan last quarter, exceeding 30% of external commercial revenue.

title: 化妆品越来越贵，化妆品公司越来越穷
content: Chinese domestic cosmetics brands have raised prices significantly—Per莱雅's core products rose over 50%, Perfect Diary's lipstick jumped from 20 to 160 yuan—while international brands cut prices. Despite higher prices, cosmetics companies earn less: Per莱雅's revenue fell 10.39% in 2025, Perfect Diary remains unprofitable with 92 million yuan losses. The culprit is soaring marketing costs. Brands rely heavily on online traffic and live-streaming sales, but internet platforms now control concentrated, expensive traffic. As new brands proliferate and compete for limited attention, marketing expenses consume revenue and profits, leaving companies as "tenant farmers" dependent on platform algorithms.

content: Somali referee Omar Abdulkadir Artan, named 2025 African Referee of the Year, was denied U.S. entry and deported despite holding a valid visa. Assigned to officiate the 2026 World Cup, the 34-year-old was stopped by immigration officials without clear explanation and returned to Turkey. The incident drew significant attention as Somalia has never qualified for the World Cup, making Artan's selection historically meaningful. FIFA has not yet responded to the situation.

title: 刚刚，OpenAI官宣提交IPO申请，最快或于秋季上市
content: OpenAI has confidentially filed an S-1 registration for an IPO, following Anthropic's similar move earlier this month. The company is working with Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley, with a potential autumn listing. OpenAI has not finalized timing, noting some tasks are easier as a private company. The company was last valued at $852 billion after a $40 billion funding round in March. CEO Sam Altman and chief scientist Jakub Pachocki published a vision paper alongside the announcement, outlining OpenAI's mission to ensure AGI benefits humanity through broad accessibility and distributed power.

title: 奥特曼认输：全球第一，根本不在OpenAI
content: OpenAI's top internal token consumer uses 100 billion tokens monthly, yet CEO Sam Altman admits this isn't the world record. Token consumption at OpenAI has grown one million-fold in six years, with the company gamifying usage through leaderboards and physical awards. However, critics like Linear's COO warn that high token spending doesn't equal productivity, citing "tokenmaxxing" abuses at Meta and Amazon where employees inflated usage without real output. OpenAI recently hired Peter Steinberger, whose $1.3 million monthly token bill actually produces value through 100 Codex instances performing continuous security and coding work. The emerging consensus: raw token access matters less than building systems that spend tokens effectively.

title: 坏了，苹果 AI 真成了？OS 27 上手体验
content: iOS 27 brings the most significant Siri update in five years, featuring redesigned app icons with enhanced glass textures, adjustable transparency sliders, and improved stability even in beta. International iPhones receive substantial AI capabilities including global search, screen awareness, and continuous conversation with a new chat-style Siri app. Camera adds a Siri mode for AI visual analysis, while Image Playground now supports realistic styles and Apple Intelligence Tools in Photos introduces advanced reframing using spatial computing. However, Chinese models get minimal updates due to missing AI server infrastructure, creating the largest regional divide in a decade.

title: NAS 折腾记
content: The author's NAS rebuild began after a failed data disk in a "Snail Star" server. They assembled a budget system using secondhand parts: an i3-7100 CPU, 12GB RAM, MSI B250M motherboard, and a small Acer case for under 320 yuan total. Build challenges included blocked SATA ports requiring an expansion card, incompatible bootloader versions, and a dead M.2 SSD. Data transfer from a replacement drive stalled completely. Despite the effort to add HDR video decoding capability, the rebuilt NAS will likely remain an underutilized image storage server.

title: 2026 06 09 HackerNews
content: A developer overcame addiction, prison, and a felony conviction to rebuild his life through open source contributions. "Dopamine fracking" describes how algorithms and capital extract pure pleasure from experiences, causing cultural homogenization. Social media has shifted from friend-based interaction to algorithm-driven entertainment, making users passive consumers while ad revenue grows. Linear's speed comes from local-first architecture using IndexedDB for instant UI response. Xiaomi's MiMo-V2.5-Pro-UltraSpeed achieves over 1000 tokens/second on a 1-trillion-parameter model. A Texas city sold donated parkland to a data center developer despite deed restrictions, and a court dismissed the donor family's lawsuit. Thermo Fisher Scientific's antibody catalog contains over 450 manipulated images showing signs of systemic data fraud. DeepSeek V4 Pro outperformed GPT-5.5 Pro on precision-focused text tasks. xAI increasingly resembles a data center REIT rather than a pure research

title: 搞了个能自己写代码进化的 AI 数字员工，聊一下怎么做的
content: The author built an AI digital worker that autonomously handles server maintenance after being woken repeatedly by alarms. Its three-layer architecture combines a cloud model for decision-making, a local 7B model for fast execution (20-50ms latency), and a skill system for actions. Key features include self-written skill expansion (200+ skills), persistent memory of operations and server states, and parallel "avatars" for multitasking. After two months, it manages server clusters and resolves issues like disk full, crashed processes, and network failures via simple chat commands.

title: 护城河还是公地：当DeepSeek们把成本砍掉99%，美国巨头的万亿豪赌要打水漂？
content: China's open-weight AI models—DeepSeek, Qwen, Kimi, and others—are collapsing AI capabilities into cheap commodities, destroying the premise behind America's trillion-dollar AI bets. U.S. labs and investors gambled on frontier models becoming monopolies with franchise-like returns. When technology fails to create scarcity, American capital predictably turns to artificial scarcity through regulatory enclosure, vertical integration, and bundled distribution. Three outcomes are likely: security-themed regulatory crackdowns on Chinese open models; labs transforming into operators capturing higher-margin services; and a split market where Americans pay inflated prices while the world bypasses U.S. control. The strategy mirrors U.S. auto industry protectionism—shielded domestic profits, uncompetitive products, and long-term decline.

title: 程序员！勇敢的拥抱 AI 时代！
content: Programmers should embrace AI practically rather than fearing replacement or chasing hype. Meaningless "vibe coding" without real needs creates no value. AI is still emerging, requiring extensive engineering work to build agent infrastructure like inference, memory, and protocols. The paradigm is shifting from human-facing software to agent-oriented development. Programmers, being closest to AI, will benefit first by learning model training, agent implementation, and optimizing existing businesses. Start applying AI to daily tools like note-taking for information management.

content: DingTalk Vice President and AI product lead Ma Ruila (real name Wang Jiamin) completed his resignation on May 15, ending a three-year tenure at Alibaba. He founded Wolai, a collaborative office platform acquired by DingTalk in 2023, where he led intelligent document and personal edition product development. Ma previously founded Chinese music portal Music Sky, film database Mtime predecessor, and real estate site Wolai Fangchan. His departure follows DingTalk CEO Ye Jun's exit in July 2024.

title: Ultra-Goal: 解放注意力，一句话让 Agent 跑完超长程任务的 Skill
content: Ultra-Goal is an AI-powered skill for executing long-range tasks with minimal human oversight. Users provide only a clear goal without implementation details; the agent dynamically explores, creates a phased roadmap, and adjusts as it progresses. Each phase involves planning (dual sub-agent design with cross-review), implementation, multi-perspective验收, and submission. Best suited for prototyping, research-heavy tasks, and feasibility validation. Trade-offs include high token consumption and long execution times. Requires manual triggering; works best with GPT-5.5 for the main agent, with Playwright-based end-to-end验收 recommended for web applications.

title: GitHub for Beginners: Answers to some common questions
content: This GitHub for Beginners episode answers common questions: how to create and add SSH keys for secure authentication; how to generate fine-grained and classic Personal Access Tokens for command-line and API access; how to resolve merge conflicts via the GitHub UI and the difference between merging (preserves branch history) and rebasing (creates linear history); how to undo commits using revert in the UI or git reset locally; how to fork repositories and sync them with upstream changes; and best practices for reviewing pull requests, including using GitHub Copilot as a reviewer.
